libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables, system properties, Docker image, external WebDAV server, or Jackrabbit repository setup appears necessary. Prefer in-process tests of WebDAV methods, XML/property/report parsing/serialization, locator behavior, and servlet adapters using simple stub javax.servlet request/response objects.

deterministic_setup.reason: The library exposes and implements javax.servlet-based APIs such as AbstractWebdavServlet, WebdavRequestImpl, WebdavResponseImpl, InputContextImpl, and OutputContextImpl, while the Maven artifact marks servlet-api as provided. Existing coverage for this library already adds servlet-api explicitly.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Do not use jakarta.servlet; this old Jackrabbit release uses javax.servlet APIs.
Some existing locator/native failures may be behavioral or reachability-metadata issues rather than setup issues; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jackrabbit-webdav is an in-process WebDAV server/client utility library, but meaningful coverage includes servlet-facing request/response/context classes; the artifact declares javax.servlet:servlet-api as a provided dependency, so the normal generated scaffold will not get it transitively.
